identifier_taxonomy: P0 identifies the single parent failure operation; Critical, High, and Medium identify individual finding severity. P0 does not encode individual finding priority.

findings.title: Operational Contract Violation
findings.primary_control: Executable Operational Contract with transition-time conformance checks
findings.acceptance_evidence: A contract violation terminates the route and records an Audit result

findings.title: Canonical Source Violation
findings.primary_control: Git-first Canonical Resolver with uncertainty stop rule
findings.acceptance_evidence: Canonical uncertainty triggers Git resolution before analytical continuation

findings.title: Runtime Invariant Violation
findings.primary_control: Immutable runtime invariants carried in the run envelope
findings.acceptance_evidence: Authority, Human Gate, mutation, and runtime invariants cannot drift silently

findings.title: Route Escalation Failure
findings.primary_control: Escalation trigger registry with mandatory Audit interrupt
findings.acceptance_evidence: Each registered trigger interrupts the active route and produces a receipt

findings.title: Unauthorized Route Substitution
findings.primary_control: Route lock with Human Gate authorization for route replacement
findings.acceptance_evidence: An unapproved replacement route is rejected before execution

findings.title: Completion Criteria Override
findings.primary_control: User-owned completion contract and closure gate
findings.acceptance_evidence: The runtime cannot close a route before user completion criteria pass

findings.title: Reporting Mutation
findings.primary_control: Immutable analytical claim record and controlled report projection
findings.acceptance_evidence: Audience adaptation preserves claim, lineage, evidence relationships, and uncertainty

findings.title: Analysis / Reporting Collapse
findings.primary_control: Typed Evidence to Analysis to Reporting boundaries
findings.acceptance_evidence: Every report claim resolves through analysis to evidence without layer collapse

findings.title: Artifact Substitution
findings.primary_control: No-placeholder and substantive-content promotion gates
findings.acceptance_evidence: A scaffold or future-work list cannot satisfy a requested substantive artifact

findings.title: Provenance Contamination
findings.primary_control: Claim-lineage and artifact-manifest reconciliation
findings.acceptance_evidence: Every delivered artifact traces to canonical inputs and immutable analytical objects

findings.title: Human Gate Bypass
findings.primary_control: Non-bypassable stop state and explicit Human Gate receipt
findings.acceptance_evidence: Human Gate activation prevents governed continuation until an explicit decision

findings.title: Governance Failure
findings.primary_control: Machine-checkable governance controls and enforcement tests
findings.acceptance_evidence: Declared governance controls have passing and failing behavioral fixtures

findings.title: False Compliance
findings.primary_control: Observable conformance receipt with fail-closed status language
findings.acceptance_evidence: A nonconforming route cannot report itself as governed or compliant

findings.title: Canonical Drift
findings.primary_control: Canonical binding by repository, branch, commit, path, and content hash
findings.acceptance_evidence: A changed canonical input invalidates the active binding and stops the route

findings.title: Generic Regression
findings.primary_control: Contract-bound dispatch with generic fallback prohibited on governed routes
findings.acceptance_evidence: Governed fixtures cannot silently enter generalized assistant execution

findings.title: Overlay Integrity Failure
findings.primary_control: Overlay activation receipt and invariant monitor
findings.acceptance_evidence: The runtime proves which overlay is active and detects invariant divergence

findings.title: Persona Dispatch Failure
findings.primary_control: Functional-seat registry and responsibility-aware dispatch
findings.acceptance_evidence: Dispatch selects an authorized stable seat and records the selection reason

findings.title: Processor Matrix Bypass
findings.primary_control: Processor-selection validation against route and analytical layer
findings.acceptance_evidence: A Processor outside the selected route or layer is rejected

findings.title: Operation Route Catalog Bypass
findings.primary_control: Route catalog resolver and route execution trace
findings.acceptance_evidence: Every governed operation names and follows a cataloged route or stops

findings.title: Audit Bypass
findings.primary_control: Continuously callable Internal Audit with interrupt capability
findings.acceptance_evidence: Audit may interrupt every material transition and records its result

findings.title: Replay Scar Omission
findings.primary_control: Mandatory Scar on stop or drift with Replay continuation reference
findings.acceptance_evidence: Every terminated route records why it stopped and how later Replay begins

findings.title: Logic Freeze
findings.primary_control: Progress watchdog with evidence-boundary and planning-loop termination
findings.acceptance_evidence: Non-progressing transitions terminate and emit Audit and Scar records

findings.title: Commentary Substitution
findings.primary_control: Execution-state accounting that excludes commentary from deliverable completion
findings.acceptance_evidence: Explanatory text alone cannot satisfy an artifact requirement

findings.title: Production Failure
findings.primary_control: Production state machine and artifact completeness gate
findings.acceptance_evidence: A package cannot become review-ready until all required substantive artifacts exist

findings.title: Evidence Serialization Failure
findings.primary_control: Evidence-carriage checks and standalone artifact replay
findings.acceptance_evidence: Counts, graphs, identities, and findings resolve to reviewable evidence artifacts

findings.title: Report Inflation
findings.primary_control: Explicit report projection and audience-adaptation contract
findings.acceptance_evidence: The requested report is produced without importing unnecessary analytical corpus

findings.title: Scientific Validation Damage
findings.primary_control: Validation-run isolation with receipts and replayable fixtures
findings.acceptance_evidence: A validation operation can be reproduced without contaminating its subject

findings.title: Trust Model Failure
findings.primary_control: Runtime conformance evidence and fail-closed governance state
findings.acceptance_evidence: Trust claims are supported by observable runtime conformance evidence

findings.title: Professional Representation Risk
findings.primary_control: Publication-readiness gate and Human Gate approval
findings.acceptance_evidence: Externally representable outputs require completeness evidence and explicit approval

findings.title: User Time Destruction
findings.primary_control: Early stop and escalation with bounded corrective transitions
findings.acceptance_evidence: Repeated planning loops terminate before consuming another production cycle

findings.title: Canonical Recovery Failure
findings.primary_control: Immediate Git recovery path on canonical uncertainty
findings.acceptance_evidence: A canonical uncertainty fixture resolves through current Git before continuation

findings.title: Escalation Persistence Failure
findings.primary_control: Correction-triggered route reevaluation and persistent interrupt
findings.acceptance_evidence: Repeated corrections change execution state or terminate the route

findings.title: Self-Analysis Loop
findings.primary_control: Bounded Audit response that returns to route or terminates
findings.acceptance_evidence: Audit commentary cannot recurse without progress or termination

findings.title: Authority Displacement
findings.primary_control: Authority-aware language and decision-ownership checks
findings.acceptance_evidence: User and Human Gate decisions remain attributed to their actual owner

findings.title: Unsupported Optimism
findings.primary_control: Evidence-bound status vocabulary
findings.acceptance_evidence: Status claims distinguish observed, inferred, candidate, verified, and promoted states

findings.title: Registry Verification Failure
findings.primary_control: Registry lookup before capability assertion
findings.acceptance_evidence: Capability assertions resolve against the current registry before reporting

findings.title: Canonical Retrieval Delay
findings.primary_control: Canonical hydration as an initialization prerequisite
findings.acceptance_evidence: Initialization cannot complete without a current canonical binding receipt

findings.title: Temporal Consistency Failure
findings.primary_control: Temporal claim typing and transition records
findings.acceptance_evidence: Claims distinguish observation time, source time, and transition time

findings.title: Execution Ownership Confusion
findings.primary_control: Attribution fields for user, system, and source conclusions
findings.acceptance_evidence: Every material conclusion records its actual origin and transformation lineage

findings.title: Contract Enforcement Failure
findings.primary_control: Parent control combining contract compiler, runtime monitor, and fail-closed Audit
findings.acceptance_evidence: An accepted contract is enforced throughout execution and any divergence terminates
